title: Cherry loading screen
description: Changes the default loading screen to a cherry blossom themed background
body:
![Loading scren](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QIgRNEme/images/7eb33613a9d828291f9ca0516b407f8b3047b11e.png)

# 🤍 Cherry Loading Screen
**_Transform_** your Minecraft loading screen with a serene cherry blossom theme. Replace the default background with soft cherry flowers for a calming and beautiful start to your game. Perfect for lovers of pink aesthetics and nature-inspired designs.


<details>
  <summary>💜 Questions</summary>

---
**💜 How to install?**
> Download this resource pack then put this on your minecraft resource pack folder and enjoy it 🤭
---
**💜 Which version are supported?**
> Currently 1.21.10 - 1.21.9 mainly supported but maybe other versions also supported. I didn't tested out the other versions 🙂
---
**💜 Does it need any requirements?**
> Yeah, you need a mod named **Puzzle**. Download from here https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle
---
**💜 I need help!**
> Here is my discord id `@snowyy173` and you can message me there if you need help 😉
---
</details>
